Hundreds of test cases execute via REST API integration with CI/CD/CT orchestration. A powerful script editor enables custom scenarios. Rich KPI reporting, alarms and flexible dashboards deliver real-time and historical insight. Evolver reproduces issues detected in live traffic under controlled conditions, confirming fixes by rerunning the same scenario in the live network."}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-xl font-serif text-[var(--foreground)] mb-4","children":"Functions
